content:
Character: Jamal Osei
Perception: Jamal's the barista — clean-cut, composed, always looks like he's running equations in his head between pouring shots. He's sharp and steady, polite without being fake. We're coffee-shop acquaintances; I think he sees me as a morning regular who orders simply and doesn't linger. Americano, black, no sugar. I know he's a law student, works hard, tips out well when he grabs food from Ferro on his break. I respect his grind. We don't talk much but I always leave the counter feeling like I dealt with someone solid.
